title: daphne stenantha
intro: Daphne stenantha, also known as the Himalayan daphne, is a flowering plant species within the family Thymelaeaceae, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Daphne stenantha is typically used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and inflammatory conditions.
